extra.reason: Implemented local asset load event logging, loupe thumbnail fallback, Tauri commands/API, and focused coverage.
Implemented UMAP projection in a web worker with cancellable projection jobs and lazy thumbnail loading.
Updated pagination clamp expectation to the new 250-item page cap and verified cargo test passes.

Implemented audit P0 fixes: CSP/narrow static asset scope with runtime library-root scope, non-destructive health default, safe DB recovery language, removed renderer API key readback, and registered/tested rescan_sidecars contract.

Implemented audit P0 fixes: CSP/narrow static asset scope with runtime library-root scope, non-destructive health default, safe DB recovery language, removed renderer API key readback, and registered/tested rescan_sidecars contract.

Implemented audit P0 fixes: CSP/narrow static asset scope with runtime library-root scope, non-destructive health default, safe DB recovery language, removed renderer API key readback, and registered/tested rescan_sidecars contract.

Implemented audit P0 fixes: CSP/narrow static asset scope with runtime library-root scope, non-destructive health default, safe DB recovery language, removed renderer API key readback, and registered/tested rescan_sidecars contract.
Implemented canonicalized MCP scope checks and default audit parameter redaction; tests added and passing.
Added migration preflight, schema_migrations/user_version tracking, integrity check, future-version rejection, and pre-migration SQLite backup coverage.

Replaced renderer-facing all-embedding IPC with paged flat embedding payloads; Embedding Explorer now projects a capped page with transferable Float32Array worker payloads; similarity lookup no longer materializes all embeddings first.
Implemented deterministic local image quality metrics with schema, analyzer, Tauri/API commands, smart collection fields, and tests.
Implemented greedy threshold embedding grouping with durable group tables, list/group image commands, TypeScript API wrappers, and Rust tests.

Implemented persistent image tag tables, enrichment backfill from existing metadata/detections/source/generation/file facts, tag-aware smart collections/search, export manifest tags, Tauri/API commands, and tests.
Fixed GUI/background diagnostic logging so stderr write failures no longer panic or abort the app; added regression coverage and verified the MCP socket tests in a clean worktree.
Implemented schema v18 image_perceptual_hashes, DCT pHash generation on import/backfill, band-indexed near-duplicate lookup, Tauri/API commands, mocks, and Rust tests.
Added job-backed pause/resume/cancel controls for CLIP model downloads, retry/resume UI after cancellation or failure, resumable .part handling, and regression tests for paused/cancelled streams.

Completed model download UX: streaming progress with bytes and ETA, pause/resume/cancel/retry controls, resumable .part downloads, manual curl command with actual model path, and backend/frontend regression tests.

Implemented DINOv2 ViT-S/14 ONNX embedding support via shared embedding model specs, Tauri/API commands, headless CLI, and MCP tools; downloaded the model and generated 24 real-library 384-dim embeddings with zero failures.
Implemented the Embedding Explorer UX directly: model picker for CLIP, DINOv2, and Gemini; model-specific status counts, download/manual-download actions, generation, projection, and job labels.
Closed
Implemented context predicates, duplicate hotkey reporting, collection workflow commands, and documented import/menu/context/AI deferrals for the shared registry slice.

Implemented and verified the accessible command palette shell contract: global shortcuts are wired, the query field exposes combobox semantics linked to the result list, options have stable active-descendant IDs, rows retain title/category/shortcut/context labels, and palette styles use design tokens.
Implemented native Image menu parity, added single-image Open With flow, documented inbound macOS integration recommendation, and filed Share Extension prototype follow-up imageview-9a9.
Implemented native Image menu parity, added single-image Open With flow, documented inbound macOS integration recommendation, and filed Share Extension prototype follow-up imageview-9a9.
Implemented native Image menu parity, added single-image Open With flow, documented inbound macOS integration recommendation, and filed Share Extension prototype follow-up imageview-9a9.

Implemented release-oriented broad format support: enabled BMP/TIFF/ICO image decoders, added macOS ImageIO fallback for HEIC/HEIF, SVG, AVIF, JPEG XL, and PSD, routed import/thumbnails/quality/color/pHash/embedding/detection through shared decode or generated JPEG thumbnails, updated Open File filters and docs, and verified with Rust, Svelte, Vitest, and production frontend build gates.

Implemented tested Finder drag/drop import routing: extracted drop path classification into a Rust helper, covered single image, multiple images, single folder, and mixed file/folder drops, wired the Tauri window drop handler through the helper, and verified the drop overlay uses design tokens.
Restored About Cull as a custom in-app dialog with app image, version metadata, and linked credits.

Implemented backend-driven embedding provider catalog and UI wiring for CLIP, DINOv2, Gemini, OpenAI text embeddings, and Ollama text embeddings; added provider mapping tests and verified frontend/Rust/E2E/build/install.
Aligned release-hardening work by replaying it onto origin/main on codex/release-top5-hardening-aligned; avoided force-updating main and kept old unrelated branch as backup.

Added GPT-generated DMG background asset, configured macOS DMG background/window/icon positions, built and mounted the generated DMG to verify Cull.app, Applications, .DS_Store, and the background image are present.
Replaced the dark DMG background with a light GPT-generated layout, added dark deterministic instruction text, rebuilt the DMG, and verified the packaged background plus label zones.

Removed the label-background bands, regenerated the light DMG artwork with a broader sweeping arrow, realigned app and Applications positions to the new icon zones, rebuilt the DMG, and verified the packaged background.

Fixed MCP curation persistence by normalizing decision values to accept/reject/undecided, preserving ratings from legacy NULL-decision selection rows, and updating UI action paths so ratings/decisions render immediately. Verified with npm test, npm run check, cargo test --lib, and E2E smoke curation flows.

User confirmed the rebuilt real installer screenshot check: background elements are removed, text is readable, and Cull / Applications icons look right. Build and packaged-background verification were already recorded.

Implemented static publishing local preview port recovery. The server now retries nearby localhost ports and falls back to an OS-assigned port when the configured port is occupied; regression tests cover occupied-port recovery and upper-bound fallback. Verified with npm run ci:rust.
Implemented audit UX/accessibility/copy fixes with failing-first contract coverage; npm run check, npm test, and npm run build pass.

Verified with npm test, npm run check, focused Rust tests, and local Tauri release build.

Implemented canonical RGB/luma histogram support with Loupe overlay and clipped shadow/highlight warnings.
Implemented persistent presets, field-level View menu toggles, bounded rail side/width/text-size controls, and truncating info rail rendering for native and web Preview Display.
Preview Display now uses the canonical histogram command, optional histogram field toggle, native/web rendering, freeze-safe shared state, and documented RAW/thumbnail fallback behavior.

Preview Display epic completed: native/window controls, shared state, monitor placement, freeze/blank, configurable rail, histogram integration, docs, tests, and tokenized web stream are implemented and verified.
